'''Trallan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Trallan system/Legends|Trallan system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Theb Tobbra]].

*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
